name: G-3 rule ID namespacing: a tree where every rule honors the per-folder prefix discipline passes the check
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_universal tree/_operator/acme tree/_community/my-plugin && printf 'source:
  id: g
rules:
  - id: g-ts-001
' > tree/google/g.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: u
rules:
  - id: g-universal-001
' > tree/_universal/u.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: o
rules:
  - id: acme-001
' > tree/_operator/acme/c.yaml && printf 'source:
  id: c
rules:
  - id: my-plugin/foo-001
' > tree/_community/my-plugin/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-id-namespacing 2>err.txt; ! grep -q 'id-namespacing:' err.txt && echo all_clean 1>&2
